inputs.label: Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Distance in kilometers to convert to meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance in kilometers to convert to meters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Entfernung in Kilometern zur Umrechnung in Meter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance en kilomètres à convertir en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia en kilómetros para convertir a metros.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Meters per kilometer. Standard value is 1000.

businessContext_i18n.en: Meters per kilometer. Standard value is 1000.
businessContext_i18n.es: Metros por kilómetro. El valor estándar es 1000.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the result.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the result.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden des Ergebnisses.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear el resultado.

inputs.label: Minimum Threshold (m)
inputs.businessContext: Output value floor, useful for safety margins.

businessContext_i18n.en: Output value floor, useful for safety margins.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı değeri tabanı, güvenlik payları için kullanışlıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Untergrenze des Ausgabewerts, nützlich für Sicherheitsmargen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Plancher de la valeur de sortie, utile pour les marges de sécurité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor mínimo de salida, útil para márgenes de seguridad.

inputs.label: Maximum Threshold (m)
inputs.businessContext: Output value ceiling, for limiting results.

businessContext_i18n.en: Output value ceiling, for limiting results.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı değeri tavanı, sonuçları sınırlamak için.
businessContext_i18n.de: Obergrenze des Ausgabewerts zur Begrenzung der Ergebnisse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Plafond de la valeur de sortie, pour limiter les résultats.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor máximo de salida, para limitar resultados.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur de lot pour les conversions en vrac.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador de lote para conversiones en masa.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
